text:
EXPLANATION: OpenCompass is a well-known, legitimate open-source evaluation platform for foundation models, and the cited URL directs to its official GitHub repository. The cited authors "OpenCompass Contributors" is a valid and commonly used shorthand for the project's collaborative development.
LINK: https://github.com/open-compass/opencompass
FOUND_TITLE: OpenCompass: A universal evaluation platform for foundation models
FOUND_AUTHORS: OpenCompass Contributors
FOUND_YEAR: 2023
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
